10/7/20, 1:03 AM - +91 72928 89444: Alice and Bob have decided to play the game "Rock, Paper, Scissors".

The game consists of several rounds, each round is independent of each other. In each round, both players show one of the following things at the same time: rock, paper or scissors. If both players showed the same things then the round outcome is a draw. Otherwise, the following rules applied:

if one player showed rock and the other one showed scissors, then the player who showed rock is considered the winner and the other one is considered the loser;
if one player showed scissors and the other one showed paper, then the player who showed scissors is considered the winner and the other one is considered the loser;
if one player showed paper and the other one showed rock, then the player who showed paper is considered the winner and the other one is considered the loser.
Alice and Bob decided to play exactly n rounds of the game described above. Alice decided to show rock a1 times, show scissors a2 times and show paper a3 times. Bob decided to show rock b1 times, show scissors b2 times and show paper b3 times. Though, both Alice and Bob did not choose the sequence in which they show things. It is guaranteed that a1+a2+a3=n and b1+b2+b3=n.

Your task is to find two numbers:

the minimum number of round Alice can win;
the maximum number of rounds Alice can win.
Input
The first line of the input contains one integer n (1≤n≤109) — the number of rounds.

The second line of the input contains three integers a1,a2,a3 (0≤ai≤n) — the number of times Alice will show rock, scissors and paper, respectively. It is guaranteed that a1+a2+a3=n.

The third line of the input contains three integers b1,b2,b3 (0≤bj≤n) — the number of times Bob will show rock, scissors and paper, respectively. It is guaranteed that b1+b2+b3=n.

Output
Print two integers: the minimum and the maximum number of rounds Alice can win.

10/7/20, 12:32 PM - +91 72928 89444: Alice and Bob have decided to play the game "Rock, Paper, Scissors".

The game consists of several rounds, each round is independent of each other. In each round, both players show one of the following things at the same time: rock, paper or scissors. If both players showed the same things then the round outcome is a draw. Otherwise, the following rules applied:

if one player showed rock and the other one showed scissors, then the player who showed rock is considered the winner and the other one is considered the loser;
if one player showed scissors and the other one showed paper, then the player who showed scissors is considered the winner and the other one is considered the loser;
if one player showed paper and the other one showed rock, then the player who showed paper is considered the winner and the other one is considered the loser.
Alice and Bob decided to play exactly n rounds of the game described above. Alice decided to show rock a1 times, show scissors a2 times and show paper a3 times. Bob decided to show rock b1 times, show scissors b2 times and show paper b3 times. Though, both Alice and Bob did not choose the sequence in which they show things. It is guaranteed that a1+a2+a3=n and b1+b2+b3=n.

Your task is to find two numbers:

the minimum number of round Alice can win;
the maximum number of rounds Alice can win.
Input
The first line of the input contains one integer n (1≤n≤109) — the number of rounds.

The second line of the input contains three integers a1,a2,a3 (0≤ai≤n) — the number of times Alice will show rock, scissors and paper, respectively. It is guaranteed that a1+a2+a3=n.

The third line of the input contains three integers b1,b2,b3 (0≤bj≤n) — the number of times Bob will show rock, scissors and paper, respectively. It is guaranteed that b1+b2+b3=n.

Output
Print two integers: the minimum and the maximum number of rounds Alice can win.

Input
479 178 29
11 145 530
output
22 334

#include<algorithm>
#include<vector>
using namespace std;
#define ll long long int
int main()
{
   ios_base::sync_with_stdio(false);
   cin.tie(NULL);
   cout.tie(NULL);
   ll a[3],b[3];
   ll t;
   cin>>t;

   while(t--)
    {

    ll n;
   cin>>n;
   for(int i=0; i<3; i++)
      cin>>a[i];

    for(int i=0;i<3;i++)
      cin>>b[i];

    ll max=0,min=0;
    for(int i=0;i<3;i++)
       if(a[i%3] > b[(i+1)%3])
           max = max + b[(i+1)%3];
       else
           max = max + a[i%3];


      //Minimum wins
      int i=0;
      for(i=0; i<3; i++)
      {

      if((b[i%3] + b[(i+1)%3]) < a[(i+1)%3])
        {
          min=a[(i+1)%3] - (b[i%3] + b[(i+1)%3]);
          break;
        }

     }
       cout<<min<<" "<<max;
    }
}

10/8/20, 8:30 AM - +91 99356 45251: Journey of Bablu and Dablu

Bablu and Dablu are traveling at train. This time they are traveling without their parents. Bablu wants to know the arrangement of seats inside the train coach.
The entire coach could be viewed as an arrangement of consecutive blocks of size 8

.

Berth Number   Compartment
1 -  8    1
9 - 16    2
17 - 24    3
... and so on
Each of these size-8
 blocks are further arranged as:
1LB,2MB,3UB,4LB,5MB,6UB,7SL,8SU,9LB,10MB,......


Here LB denotes lower berth, MB middle berth, and UB upper berth.

The following berths are called Train-Partners:
7SL |  8SU
3UB |  6UB 
2MB |  5MB
1LB |  4LB
and the pattern is repeated for every set of 8

 berths.
Bablu and Dablu are playing a game of finding the train partner of each berth. But they are not able to find the right partner, they ask for help.
Input Format

The first line of input contains a single integer T
, denoting the number of test cases to follow.
Each of the next T lines contains a single integer N

, the berth number whose neighbor is to be found out.
Output Format

The output should contain exactly T

 lines each containing the berth of the neighbor of the corresponding seat.
Constraints

1≤T≤106

1≤N≤106

Time Limit

1

 second
Example
Input

4
3
5 
1 
8
Output

6UB
2MB
4LB
7SL
10/8/20, 8:31 AM - +91 99356 45251: Please help me out with this
10/8/20, 10:50 AM - +91 80103 79281: import java.util.*;
import java.io.*;

public class Main {
  public static void main(String args[]) throws IOException {
    
    //write your code here
    Scanner sc = new Scanner(System.in);
    int test = sc.nextInt();
    
    for(int i=0;i<test;i++)
    {
      int s = sc.nextInt();
      
      if (s % 8 == 1)
        System.out.println(s+3 +  "LB");
      else if(s % 8 == 4)
        System.out.println(s-3 +"LB");
      else if (s % 8 == 2)
        System.out.println(s+3 +"MB");
      else if(s % 8 == 5) 
        System.out.println(s-3 +"MB");
      else if(s % 8 == 3)
        System.out.println(s+3 +"UB");  
      else if(s % 8 == 6) 
        System.out.println(s-3 +"UB");
      else if(s % 8 == 7) 
        System.out.println(s+1 +"SU");
      else if(s % 8 == 0) 
        System.out.println(s-1 +"SL");
    }
  }
}

10/12/20, 12:43 AM - +91 72239 50090: tc=int(input())
for i in range(tc):
    N,A,B=map(int,input().split(" "))
    data_list=[]
    for i in range(0,N+1):
        for j in range(0,N+1):
            lst=[]
            k=i+j
            if k==N:
                lst.append(i)
                lst.append(j)
                data_list.append(lst)
    fnl_lst=[]
    for l in data_list:
        res,res1,res2=0,0,0
        res1=l[0]*l[0]
        res2=l[1]*l[1]
        res=((A*res1) + (B*res2))
        fnl_lst.append(res)
    print(min(fnl_lst))

10/14/20, 2:47 PM - +91 72928 89444: Alice and Bob have decided to play the game "Rock, Paper, Scissors".

The game consists of several rounds, each round is independent of each other. In each round, both players show one of the following things at the same time: rock, paper or scissors. If both players showed the same things then the round outcome is a draw. Otherwise, the following rules applied:

if one player showed rock and the other one showed scissors, then the player who showed rock is considered the winner and the other one is considered the loser;
if one player showed scissors and the other one showed paper, then the player who showed scissors is considered the winner and the other one is considered the loser;
if one player showed paper and the other one showed rock, then the player who showed paper is considered the winner and the other one is considered the loser.
Alice and Bob decided to play exactly n rounds of the game described above. Alice decided to show rock a1 times, show scissors a2 times and show paper a3 times. Bob decided to show rock b1 times, show scissors b2 times and show paper b3 times. Though, both Alice and Bob did not choose the sequence in which they show things. It is guaranteed that a1+a2+a3=n and b1+b2+b3=n.

Your task is to find two numbers:

the minimum number of round Alice can win;
the maximum number of rounds Alice can win.
Input
The first line of the input contains one integer n (1≤n≤109) — the number of rounds.

The second line of the input contains three integers a1,a2,a3 (0≤ai≤n) — the number of times Alice will show rock, scissors and paper, respectively. It is guaranteed that a1+a2+a3=n.

The third line of the input contains three integers b1,b2,b3 (0≤bj≤n) — the number of times Bob will show rock, scissors and paper, respectively. It is guaranteed that b1+b2+b3=n.

Output
Print two integers: the minimum and the maximum number of rounds Alice can win.

479 178 29
11 145 530
outputCopy
22 334

10/15/20, 10:00 AM - +91 80909 31634: class Ideone
{
	public static int power(int a,int b){
		if(b==0)
		  return a;
		
		return (a*power(a,b-1));
	}
	public static void main (String[] args) throws java.lang.Exception
	{
		System.out.println(power(5,4));
	}
}

       a[j]=temp;

}

10/15/20, 10:58 PM - +91 95550 70785: Problem
There are N houses for sale. The i-th house costs Ai dollars to buy. You have a budget of B dollars to spend.

What is the maximum number of houses you can buy?

Input
The first line of the input gives the number of test cases, T. T test cases follow. Each test case begins with a single line containing the two integers N and B. The second line contains N integers. The i-th integer is Ai, the cost of the i-th house.

Output
For each test case, output one line containing Case #x: y, where x is the test case number (starting from 1) and y is the maximum number of houses you can buy.

Limits
Time limit: 15 seconds per test set.
Memory limit: 1GB.
1 ≤ T ≤ 100.
1 ≤ B ≤ 105.
1 ≤ Ai ≤ 1000, for all i.

Test set 1
1 ≤ N ≤ 100.

Test set 2
1 ≤ N ≤ 105.

Sample

Input
 	
Output
 
3
4 100
20 90 40 90
4 50
30 30 10 10
3 300
999 999 999

  
Case #1: 2
Case #2: 3
Case #3: 0
10/15/20, 10:58 PM - +91 95550 70785: #include <iostream>
#include<vector>
#include<algorithm>
using namespace std;

int main()
{
    int n;
    cin >> n;
    for (int i = 0;i < n;i++)
    {
        int num;
        cin >> num;
        int paisa;
        cin >> paisa;
        vector <int> a;

        for (int j = 0;j < num;j++)
        {
            int temp;
            cin >> temp;
            a.push_back(temp);
        }
        sort(a.begin(), a.end());
        int sum = 0;
        for (int j = 0;j < num;j++)
        {
            if (paisa >= a[j])
            {
                sum++;
                paisa = paisa - a[j];

            }
        }
        cout << sum;
    }

    //std::cout << "Hello World!\n";
}

10/17/20, 9:22 AM - +91 96939 68309: #include <bits/stdc++.h>
using namespace std;

int main() {
    ios_base::sync_with_stdio(false); 
    cin.tie(NULL);
    
    int casesNum {0}, casesSum {0}, temp {0};
    
    cin >> casesNum;
    while(casesNum--){
        cin >> temp;
        casesSum += temp;
    }
    
    set <int> binaryTermsSet;
    int i=0;
    int setSize = 0;
    while (casesSum > 0) { 
        temp = (casesSum % 2)*pow(2,i);
        if(temp!=0){
            binaryTermsSet.insert(temp);
            ++setSize;
        }
        casesSum = casesSum / 2; 
        ++i;
    } 
    
    for (auto it=binaryTermsSet.begin(); it != binaryTermsSet.end(); ++it){ 
        cout << *it;
        --setSize;
        if(setSize>=1)
            cout << " ";
    }
    
	// your code goes here
	return 0;
}

10/18/20, 11:09 AM - +91 78956 44667: Given two arrays A and B consisting of blocks heights. The ith element of A represents the height of the ith block in A. Similarly, the ith element of B represents the block height of the ith block in B. B has all distinct height blocks. We have to make the sequence in A exactly same as that of B. We can only perform two operations: Delete and Insert. If we delete any element from A, it costs us 0, while if we insert an element, it costs C. Find the minimum cost required to convert sequence A into B.

Example: A=[1,6,3,5,10] B=[3,1,5] and C=2 Solution: Minimum Cost=2 as we can first remove blocks 1,6,and 10 (cost=0) then we can add 1 between 3 and 5 (cost=c).

10/18/20, 9:51 PM - +1 (585) 957-4486: #include<iostream>
#include<math.h>
#include<bits/stdc++.h>

using namespace std;

class pairAns{

	public:
	 int maxSum;
	 int startIndex;
	 int endIndex;

	public:
	pairAns(int maxSum,int startIndex,int endIndex){
		this->maxSum = maxSum;
		this->startIndex = startIndex;
		this->endIndex = endIndex;
	}


};




pairAns kadaneAlgo(int* temp){

// 	int n = temp.size();
    int n = sizeof(temp)/sizeof(temp[0]);

	int maxStart = -1;
	int maxEnd = -1;

	int currStart = 0;

	int max = 0;
	int max_so_far = 0;
	int maxSum = INT_MIN;

	for(int i = 0;i<n;i++)
	{
		max_so_far += temp[i];
		

		if(max < max_so_far){
			// if currSum is greater than maxSUm
		
			max = max_so_far;
			maxStart = currStart;
			maxEnd = i;
		}

		if(max_so_far<0){
			max_so_far = 0;
			currStart = i+1;
		}


	}

	pairAns p(max,maxStart,maxEnd);


}




int maxSumRectangle(int** input,int rows,int cols){


	// int* temp = new int[rows];
	int temp[rows];

	int maxSum = INT_MIN;

	// pairAns currSum;

	for(int left = 0;left<rows;left++)
	{
		memset(temp,0,sizeof(temp));

		for(int right = left;right<cols;right++){

			// updating the temp array with + of right pointer value

			temp[left] += input[left][right];

			// Kadance Algo

			pairAns currSum = kadaneAlgo(temp);

			maxSum = max(maxSum,currSum.maxSum);
		

		}
	}

	return maxSum;


}



int main(){

	int rows;
	int cols;

	cin >> rows;
	cin >> cols;

	int** input = new int*[rows];

	for(int i = 0;i<rows;i++){
		input[i] = new int[cols];
	}

	// input array

	for(int i = 0;i<rows;i++){
		for(int j = 0;j<cols;j++){
			cin >> input[i][j];
		}
	}

	int ans = maxSumRectangle(input,rows,cols);

	cout << ans << endl;


}

using namespace std;

int main() {
	int t,n;
	cin>>t;
	while(t--)
	{
	    cin>>n;
	    long int arr[n];
	    for(int i=0;i<n;i++)
	    {
	        cin>>arr[i];
	    }
	    int max=0,sum=0;
	    for(int i=0;i<n-1;i++)
	    {
	        sum=arr[i]+arr[i+1];
	        if(max==0)
	        {
	            max=sum;
	        }
	        if(sum<max)
	        {
	            max=sum;
	        }
	    }
	    cout<<max<<endl;
	}
	return 0;
}

If just want to see the problem, click on this https://www.geeksforgeeks.org/minimize-the-maximum-difference-between-the-heights/

I've tried using this approach and I'm stuck here,
  arr = [3, 9, 12, 16, 20], k = 3
  after sorting (if arr was unsorted)
  [3, 9, 12, 16, 20]
  smallest = 3
  largest = 20
  max_diff = 20 - 3 = 17
  to reduce it, we need to add k to 3 and sub k from 17
  so, smallest = 6
      largest = 17
      max_diff becomes 17 - 6 = 11
  I'm stuck in, how to process elements from i = 1 to n - 2th index

10/19/20, 6:28 PM - +91 91822 42809: Bro its easy wait I will send you my code with comments
10/19/20, 6:30 PM - +91 91822 42809: class Solution{   
public:
    int getMinDiff(int arr[], int n, int k) 
    {
        if(n==1)
        return 0;
       sort(arr,arr+n);
       /*we will find the difference between maximum and minimum in our array 
       brefore adding/subtracting k from any element.*/
       /*its obvious that we have to subtract k from the largest and add k to the 
       minimum.*/
       int ans=arr[n-1]-arr[0];//initial ans
       int small=arr[0]+k;
       int big=arr[n-1]-k;
       /*after adding k to the smallest and subtracting k from the largest there
       might be the possibility that the smalland big may change*/
       if(small>big)
       swap(small,big);
        
        //lets now look at the middle elements
        int subtract;//subtracting k from oour current element
        int add;//adding k to our current element
        for(int i=1;i<n-1;i++)
        {
             subtract=arr[i]-k;
             add=arr[i]+k;
             /*note that since our array was sorted,all the elements here will be 
             greater than a[0] and smaller than a[n-1]. */
             /*after adding k to our current element(result stored in add),We have 3
             possibilities.*/
             /*lets say our a[]={1,2,3,4,5,6,7},k=2.We will have our big as 5 and small
             as 3 in the first case.We will analyse this step by step.*/
             /*we will loop from a[1] to a[5].*/
             
             /*i=1 case:
             subtract=2-2=0<small; NOT OPTIMAL.
             add=2+2=4<5;OPTIMAL;
             we cant subtract because if we do subtraction then,we should update our
             small from 1 to 0 and then the difference between big and small increases.
             we will now check adding k to a[1].k+a[1]=2+2=4.Now this 4 is lesser than
             big(5) and so no problem.So we will choose to add k(optimal) to keep the 
             difference bwteen big and small same.We tried to minimie but that wasnt 
             possible.*/
             
             /*i=2 case:
             add=3+k=3+2=5=big(5).This implies adding can be good.
             subtract=3-k=3-2=1<small(3).This implies subtracting is not a good choice.*/
             
             /*i=3 case:
             add=4+k=6>big.NOT OPTIMAL
             subtract=4-2=2<small.NOT OPTIMAL.
             since both are not optimal,we have to now change/update either big or
             small variable by making optimal choice.Lets analyse here carefully.
             
             add=6;
             big=5;
             small=3;
             subtract=2;
             
             notice the above order carefully.We have 2 choices,we can update big 
             to add or small to subtract.We have to choose the optimal one.
             If we update small to subtract keeping the big same,we will get the 
             difference as big-small=5-2=3.if we update big to add(keeping the small 
             same),then we get big-small=6-3=3.From both cases,we have to choose the 
             option which gives the minimum difference.We have to update either big
             or small(using add or subtract) such that the difference bwteen the big
             and the small is minimum.This is our strategy.
             
             new big=6;
             small=3;
             we can also do the other way round since both give the same result.*/
             
            /*i=4 case:
            add=5+2=7>big;NOT OPTIMAL
            subtract=5-2=3=small;OPTIMAL
            
            we got one optimal case.So we will move on */
            
            /*i=5 case:
            add=6+2=8>big;NOT OPTIMAL
            subtract=6-2=4>small;OPTIMAL
            
            we stop here. */
            
            /*finally our big=6;small=3 and minimum difference between the largest
            and the smallest is 3.
            Before modification:a[]={1,2,3,4,5,6,7}
            After modification: a[]={3,4,5,6,3,4,5} if we have modified/updated 
            small in the intermediate step ie at index i=4;we would have got a 
            different answer.
            
            After modification: a[]={3,4,5,2,3,4,5} here also the difference between
            the maximum and minimum is 3 same as in previous case.So both are valid 
            answers unless one move(either updating big/small) is more preferred 
            over the other.*/
            
            /*so lets write down the cases.
            condition-1: if add<=big
            condition-2: if subtract>=small
            
            if both are satisfied or even if one is satisfied also its fine(we
            continue).lets consider the case if both of them fail
            (same as in previous case)
            add=6;
            big=5;
            small=3;
            subtract=2;
            
            then we compare the two values (add-small) and (big-subtract) and choose
            the minimum of both the cases.
            
            if(big-subtract<=add-small) then we should update the small to subtract
            and keep  the big as it is.
            else
            we should update the big to add and keep the small as it is!!!.
            */
            
             if(subtract>=small || add<=big)
             continue;
             else
             {
                 
                 if(big-subtract<=add-small)
                 small=subtract;
                 else
                 big=add;
             }
        }
        return min(ans,big-small);
    }
};

int main() {

	while(t--)
	{
	    cin>>n>>k;
	    long int sum1=0,sum2=0;
	    vector<long int> vr;
	    for(int i=0;i<n;i++)
	    {
	        long int h;
	        cin>>h;
	        vr.push_back(h);
	    }
	    sort(vr.begin(),vr.end());
	    for(int i=0;i<n;i++)
	    {
	        if(i<k)
	        {
	        sum1+=vr[i];
	        }
	        else
	        {
	            sum2+=vr[i];
	        }
	    }
	    cout<<sum2-sum1<<endl;
	}
	return 0;
}

int main()
{
    
    int t;
    cin >> t;
    for (int i = 0;i < t;i++)
    {
        int n;
        cin >> n;
        int k;
        cin >> k;
        vector<int>a;
        for (int j = 0;j < n;j++)
        {
            int temp;
            cin >> temp;
            a.push_back(temp);
        }
        int sum1 = 0, sum2 = 0;
        sort(a.begin(), a.end());
        for (int j = 0;j < k;j++)
        {
            sum1 += a[j];
        }
        for (int j = k;j < n;j++)
        {
            sum2 += a[j];
        }
        cout << sum2 - sum1<<endl;
    }
}

10/23/20, 11:32 PM - +91 73554 80774: #include <iostream>
#include <algorithm>
using namespace std;
int main()
{
    int x;
    cin >> x;
    int arr[x];
    for(int i=0;i<=x-1;i++)
    {
        cin >> arr[i];
    }
    int maxint;
    for(int j=0;j<=x-1;j++)
    {
        if(j<x-1)
        {
            maxint= max(arr[j], arr[j+1]);
        }
    }
    if(x<=1)
    {
        cout << 0;
    }
    else {
    int coun=0;
    for(int k=0;k<=x-1;k++)
    {
        coun = coun + (maxint - arr[k]);
    }
    cout << coun;
    }
}

10/25/20, 1:27 PM - +91 72239 50090: #include<stdio.h>

int main()
{
    int n,k,j,m,p;
    float atebanana=0.0,atepeanut=0.0;
    scanf("%d %d %d %d %d",&n,&k,&j,&m,&p);
    if(n<0 || k<0 || j<0 || m<0 || p<0)
    {
        printf("INVALID INPUT");
    }
    else
    {
        if(k>0)
            atebanana =(float)m/k;
        if(j>0)
            atepeanut =(float) p/j;
        n=n-atebanana-atepeanut;
        printf("Number of Monkeys left on the Tree:%d",n);
    }
    return 0;
}

10/25/20, 6:14 PM - +91 90365 63637: CPS=["MH04CC2","MH04C2820","MH04BB3232","MH04CC2113","MH04CC2878","MH04BB8","MH04CC2888","MH04CC1313","MH04CC2222","MH04C1201","MH04CC555","MH04C6565","MH04A7"]
def Search(PlateNumber):
    for pos,num in enumerate(CPS,1):
        if(PlateNumber==num):
            return pos
    return -1
def Park(PlateNumber):
    for pos,num in enumerate(CPS,1):
        if(PlateNumber==num):
            return (pos*2)
    return -1
    
a=int(input())
if(a==1 or a==2):
    number=input()
    numlen=len(number)
    if(numlen<6 or numlen>12):
        print("INVALID INPUT")
    elif(a==2):
        pos=Search(number)
        if pos>0:
            print("CAR POSITION:",pos,sep="")
        else:
            print("CAR DOES NOT EXISTS")
    elif(a==1):
        pos=Park(number)
        if(pos>0):
            print("CAR POSITION:",pos,sep="")
        else:
            print("INVALID INPUT")
else:
    print("INVALID INPUT")

using namespace std;

int main()
{
    string c[3]={"Espresso Coffee","Cappuccino Coffee","Latte Coffee"};
    string t[8]={"Plain Tea","Assam Tea","Ginger Tea","Cardamom Tea","Masala Tea","Lemon Tea","Green Tea","Organic Darjeeling Tea"};
    string s[4]={"Hot and Sour Soup","Veg Corn Soup","Tomato Soup","Spicy Tomato Soup"};
    string b[3]={"Hot Chocolate Drink","Badam Drink","Badam-Pista Drink"};
    char str[]="Welcome to CCD!\nEnjoy your ";
    char ch;
    int  item;
    cin>>ch>>item;
    if(ch!='C' && ch!='c' && ch!='T' && ch!='t' && ch!='B' && ch!='b' && ch!='S' && ch!='s')
    {
        cout<<"INVALID OPTION!";
    }
    else if(ch=='C' || ch=='c')
    {
        if(item<=0 || item>3)
            cout<<"INVALID OPTION!";
        else
            cout<<str<<c[item-1]<<"!";

    }
    else if(ch=='T' || ch=='t')
    {
        if(item<=0 || item>8)
            cout<<"INVALID OPTION!";
        else
            cout<<str<<t[item-1]<<"!";

    }
    else if(ch=='S' || ch=='s')
    {
        if(item<=0 || item>4)
            cout<<"INVALID OPTION!";
        else
            cout<<str<<s[item-1]<<"!";

    }
    else if(ch=='B' || ch=='b')
    {
        if(item<=0 || item>3)
            cout<<"INVALID OPTION!";
        else
            cout<<str<<b[item-1]<<"!";

    }
    return 0;
}

10/29/20, 1:56 PM - +91 84598 65378: https://leetcode.com/problems/find-peak-element/submissions/
10/29/20, 1:56 PM - +91 84598 65378: class Solution {
public:
    int findPeakElement(vector<int>& nums) 
    {
        long int l = -1;
        long int r = nums.size();
        long int mid;
        
        while(l+1 <= r-1)
        {
			mid = l + (r - l) / 2;
			
            if(nums[mid+1] < nums[mid] && nums[mid] > nums[mid-1] )
            {
                return mid;
            }
            else if(nums[mid+1] > nums[mid])
            {
                l = mid;
            }
            else
            {
                r = mid;
            }
        
        }
        
        return mid;
    }
};

11/1/20, 6:04 PM - +91 70930 58788: https://leetcode.com/problems/delete-node-in-a-bst/
11/1/20, 6:05 PM - +91 70930 58788: For this problem i wrote this solution ,but getting wrong in some test cases, can anyone tell me the mistake          


class Solution {
    public TreeNode deleteNode(TreeNode root, int key) {
     if(root==null)
         return null;
     delete(root,key,null,true);
        return root;
    }
    void delete(TreeNode root,int key,TreeNode par,boolean isLeft)
    {
        if(root==null)
            return;
        if(root.val==key)
        {
          if(root.left==null &&root.right==null)
          {
              if(par==null)
                 root=null;
              else
              {
                if(isLeft) par.left=null;
                else par.right=null;
              }
          }
            else if(root.left==null)
            {
                if(par==null)
                    root=root.right;
                else
                {
                    if(isLeft)
                        par.left=root.right;
                    else 
                        par.right=root.right;
                }
            }
            else if(root.right==null)
            {
                if(par==null)
                 root=root.left;   
                else
                {
                    if(isLeft)
                        par.left=root.left;
                    else par.right=root.left;
                }
            }
            else 
            {
                TreeNode nextSuccesor=findSuccesor(root.right,root,false);
                if(par==null)
                    root.val=nextSuccesor.val;
                else
                {
                    if(isLeft)
                        par.left.val=nextSuccesor.val;
                    else
                        par.right.val=nextSuccesor.val;
                }
            }
            return;
        }
        if(root.val>key)
            delete(root.left,key,root,true);
                  else
                        delete(root.right,key,root,false);
    }
    TreeNode findSuccesor(TreeNode root,TreeNode par,boolean isLeft)
    {
        while(root.left!=null)
        {
            isLeft=true;
            par=root;
            root=root.left;
        }
        TreeNode temp=root;
        if(isLeft)
        par.left=root.left;
        else par.right=root.right;
        return temp;
    }
}

11/3/20, 7:14 AM - +91 96399 29260: *In audio may anyone please explain the below code (Python)*

👇🏻👇🏻👇🏻👇🏻👇🏻


import tkinter
import random

random_index = random.randint(0, 3)
words_list = ["habit", "feminist", "disability", "monster"]
computer_guess = words_list[0]

x = 2;


def chances():
    global x
    x = x - 1
    label_chances["text"] = "chances: " + str(x)
    if x == 0:
        label_result["text"] = "you lost"


def check():
    # get the value from txt_guess
    global user_guess
    user_guess = txt_guess.get()
    if user_guess == computer_guess:
        # show the result
        label_result["text"] = "you win!!"
    else:
        # show the result
        label_result["text"] = "wrong"
        # call the function chaces
        chances()


def reset():
    # declare global variable
    global computer_guess
    global random_index
    # get a random  number
    random_index = random.randint(0, 3)
    computer_guess = words_list[random_index]

    # change the label
    label_result["text"] = "good luck"
    # delete the user input
    txt_guess.delete(0, 10)
    # set the chances to original value
    global x
    x = 2
    # reset the text of no of chances
    label_chances["text"] = "chances: 2"


# create root window
root = tkinter.Tk()

# create widgets
label_title = tkinter.Label(root, text="Guess the word from the following words")
label_title.pack()

label_words = tkinter.Label(root, text="habit, feminist, disability, monster")
label_words.pack()

label_chances = tkinter.Label(root, text="chances: 2")
label_chances.pack()

label_result = tkinter.Label(root, text="Good luck")
label_result.pack()

btn_check = tkinter.Button(root, text="check", fg="green", command=check)
btn_check.pack(side="left")

btn_reset = tkinter.Button(root, text="reset", fg="red", command=reset)
btn_reset.pack(side="right")

txt_guess = tkinter.Entry(root, width=10)
txt_guess.pack()

# start the main eventsloop
root.mainloop()
root.destroy()

11/4/20, 8:36 PM - +91 70930 58788: https://leetcode.com/problems/linked-list-in-binary-tree/
11/4/20, 8:36 PM - +91 70930 58788: for this problem , I wrote this solution, but im getting wrong in two test cases, can anyone tell the mistakefor this problem , I wrote this solution, but im getting wrong in two test cases, can anyone tell the mistake


class Solution {
    public boolean isSubPath(ListNode head, TreeNode root) {
        return dfs(root,head);
    }
    boolean dfs(TreeNode root,ListNode head)
    {
        if(root==null)
            return false;
        if(root.val==head.val && isEqual(root,head))
            return true;
        return dfs(root.left,head) || dfs(root.right,head);
    }
    boolean isEqual(TreeNode root,ListNode head)
    {
        if(head==null)
            return true;
        if(root==null)
            return false;
        if(root.val!=head.val)
            return false;
        return isEqual(root.left,head.next) || dfs(root.right,head.next);
            
    }
}

Compute the maximum number of questions you could have gotten correctly.
Input
The first line of input contains a single integer k.
The second line contains a string of n (1 ≤ n ≤ 1000) characters, the answers you wrote down.
Each letter is either a ‘T’ or an ‘F’.
The third line contains a string of n characters, the answers your friend wrote down. Each letter
is either a ‘T’ or an ‘F’.
The input will satisfy 0 ≤ k ≤ n.
Output
Print, on one line, the maximum number of questions you could have gotten correctly.

11/11/20, 7:09 PM - +91 95550 70785: #include <iostream>
#include<algorithm>
#include<vector>
using namespace std;
int sort(int a[],int n)
{
    for (int i = 0;i < n;i++)
    {
        for (int j = 0;j < n-1;j++)
        {
            int temp;
            if (a[j + 1] < a[j])
            {
                temp = a[j];
                a[j] = a[j + 1];
                a[j + 1] = temp;
            }
        }
    }
    int num = a[0] + a[1];
    return num;
}
int main()
{
    int t;
    cin >> t;
    for (int j = 0;j < t;j++)
    {
        int n;
        cin >> n;
        int a[1000];
        for (int i = 0;i < n;i++)
        {
            cin >> a[i];
        }

        cout << sort(a, n);
    }
}

11/11/20, 9:28 PM - +91 95550 70785: #include <iostream>
#include<algorithm>
#include<vector>
using namespace std;
int sort(int a[],int n)
{
    for (int i = 0;i < n;i++)
    {
        for (int j = 0;j < n-1;j++)
        {
            int temp;
            if (a[j + 1] < a[j])
            {
                temp = a[j];
                a[j] = a[j + 1];
                a[j + 1] = temp;
            }
        }
    }
    int num = a[0] + a[1];
    return num;
}
int main()
{
    int t;
    cin >> t;
    for (int j = 0;j < t;j++)
    {
        int n;
        cin >> n;
        int a[1000];
        for (int i = 0;i < n;i++)
        {
            cin >> a[i];
        }

        cout << sort(a, n);
    }
}

    long long mid;

        mid=(start+end)/2;
        if(v[mid]<x && v[mid+1]>=x){
            return mid;
            
        }else if(v[mid]>x){
            end=mid-1;
        }else {
            start=mid+1;
        }
        
    }

    }

11/12/20, 12:39 PM - +91 96320 97691: class Solution {
    public int searchInsert(int[] nums, int target) {
        int low=0,high=nums.length-1;
        while(low<=high)
        {
            int mid=low+(high-low)/2;
            if(nums[mid]==target)
                return mid;
            else if(nums[mid]<target)
                low=low+1;
            else if(nums[mid]>target)
                high=high-1;
            
            
        }
        return low;
        
    }
}

#include<vector>
#include<algorithm>
using namespace std;
int sum(vector <int>a, int begin, int end)
{
    int sum = 0;
    for (int i = begin;i <= end;i++)
    {
        sum += a[i];
    }
    return sum;
}
int mod(int n) {
    if (n >=0)
        return n;
    else return-1 * n;
}
vector<int>a;
int main()
{
    int t;
    cin >> t;
    while(t--)
    {
        int n, k;
        cin >> n >> k;
        for (int i = 0;i < n;i++)
        {
            int temp;
            cin >> temp;
            a.push_back(temp);
        }
        sort(a.begin(), a.end());
        long long sum1, sum2;
        sum1 = sum(a, 0, k - 1);
        sum2 = sum(a, k, n - 1);
        cout << mod(sum2 - sum1);
    }
}

11/13/20, 8:15 PM - +91 76119 88883: Andre has very specific tastes. Recently he started falling in love with arrays.

Andre calls an nonempty array b good, if sum of its elements is divisible by the length of this array. For example, array [2,3,1] is good, as sum of its elements — 6 — is divisible by 3, but array [1,1,2,3] isn't good, as 7 isn't divisible by 4.

Andre calls an array a of length n perfect if the following conditions hold:

Every nonempty subarray of this array is good.
For every i (1≤i≤n), 1≤ai≤100.
Given a positive integer n, output any perfect array of length n. We can show that for the given constraints such an array always exists.

An array c is a subarray of an array d if c can be obtained from d by deletion of several (possibly, zero or all) elements from the beginning and several (possibly, zero or all) elements from the end.

Input
Each test contains multiple test cases. The first line contains the number of test cases t (1≤t≤100). Description of the test cases follows.

The first and only line of every test case contains a single integer n (1≤n≤100).

Output
For every test, output any perfect array of length n on a separate line.

Example
inputCopy
3
1
2
4
outputCopy
24
19 33
7 37 79 49
Note
Array [19,33] is perfect as all 3 its subarrays: [19], [33], [19,33], have sums divisible by their lengths, and therefore are good.

int main() {

while(t--){
    cin>>n;
    int arr[n];
    for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
        cin>>arr[i];
    }
    int m=arr[0];
    for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
        m=min(m,arr[i]);
    }
    v.push_back(-1);
    s.push(arr[0]);
    for(int i=1;i<n;i++){
        if(arr[i]==m){
            v.push_back(-1);
            s.push(m);
        }else if(arr[i]>s.top()){
            v.push_back(s.top());
            s.push(arr[i]);

            v.push_back(m);
        }
    }

11/15/20, 9:16 PM - +91 91238 47093: #include<iostream>
#include<vector>
#include<cstring>
typedef long long int ll;
using namespace std;
const int Nmax=32000;

bool prime[Nmax+1];
vector<int> prime_list;

void sieve()
{
    memset(prime,true,sizeof(prime));
    prime[0]=prime[1]=false;
    for(int i=2;i*i<=Nmax;i++)
        if(prime[i])
            for(int j=i*i;j<=Nmax;j+=i)
                prime[j]=false;   
    for(int i=2;i<=Nmax;i++)
        if(prime[i])
            prime_list.push_back(i);
}

void seg_sieve(ll l,ll r)
{
    bool arr[r-l+1];
    memset(arr,true,sizeof(arr));
    if (l == 1)
        arr[0] = false;
    for(int i=0;prime_list[i]*prime_list[i]<=r;i++)
    {
        ll currentprime=prime_list[i];
        ll base=(l/currentprime)*currentprime;
        if(base<l)
            base+=currentprime;
        for(ll j=base;j<=r;j+=currentprime)
            arr[j-l]=false;
        if (base == currentprime)
            arr[base - l] = true;
    }
    for (int i = 0; i < r - l + 1; ++i)
    {
        if (arr[i])
            cout << (i + l) << endl;
    }
}

int main()
{
    sieve();
    int t;
    cin>>t;
    while(t--)
    {
        ll l,r;
        cin>>l>>r;
        seg_sieve(l,r);
    }

    return 0;
}

Given two integers x and y, construct an infinite sequence of integers A = {a0, a1, a2, . . . } as
follows: a0 = 0 and for every i ≥ 1, a2i−1 = a2i−2 + x and a2i = a2i−1 − y.
Given three integers x, y and z, find the index of the first occurrence of z in A or report that z
does not appear in A.
For example, if x = 2, y = 1 and z = 3, then A = (0, 2, 1, 3, 2, 4, 3, . . .) and the answer is 3 (a3 = 3
and this is the first occurrence of 3 in A). If x = 2, y = 0 and z = 3, then A = (0, 2, 2, 4, 4, 6, 6, . . .)
and the answer is −1 (there is no occurrence of 3 in A).
Input
Three integers x, y and z (0 ≤ x, y, z ≤ 1000) separated by spaces.
Output

using namespace std;

int main()
{
    int t;
    cin >> t;
    while (t--)
    {
        size_t lol;
        cin >> lol;
        size_t n;
        cin >> n;
        size_t count = 0;
        while (n >= 1)
        {
            if (n % 10 == 1)
                count++;
            n = n / 10;
        }
        size_t result, resultt;
        result = count * (count - 1);
        resultt = result / 2 + count;
        cout << resultt << endl;
    }
}

11/19/20, 10:26 AM - +91 63044 49114: Hey @⁨~Ashutosh⁩ try this
#include <stdio.h>
int main() {
    double n1, n2, n3;
    printf("Enter three different numbers: ");
    scanf("%lf %lf %lf", &n1, &n2, &n3);

    // if n1 is greater than both n2 and n3, n1 is the largest
    if (n1 >= n2 && n1 >= n3)
        printf("%.2f is the largest number.", n1);

    // if n2 is greater than both n1 and n3, n2 is the largest
    if (n2 >= n1 && n2 >= n3)
        printf("%.2f is the largest number.", n2);

    // if n3 is greater than both n1 and n2, n3 is the largest
    if (n3 >= n1 && n3 >= n2)
        printf("%.2f is the largest number.", n3);

    return 0;
}

11/19/20, 7:28 PM - +91 70930 58788: For this question i have done this solution , but getting exception, can anyone tell me why???
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
import java.util.*;
class Practice
{
    int dx[]={0,0,1,-1};
    int dy[]={1,-1,0,0};
    char dir[]={'n','s','e','w'};
    boolean vis[][];
    int min=0;
    void solve()
    {
        Scanner sc=new Scanner(System.in);
        int t=sc.nextInt();
        while(t-->0)
        {
            int x=sc.nextInt();
            int y=sc.nextInt();
            vis=new boolean[10001][10001];
            min=0;
            dfs(0,0,x,y,Integer.MAX_VALUE,vis,'q');
            System.out.println(min);
        }
    }
    void dfs(int cx,int cy,int x,
    int y,int sum,boolean vis[][],char prev)
    {
        if(cx==x && cy==y)
        {
           min=Math.min(sum,min);
           return;
        }
        vis[cx][cy]=true;
        for(int i=0;i<4;i++)
        {
            int u=cx+dx[i];int v=cy+dy[i];
            if(valid(u,v,vis) && dir[i]!=prev)
                dfs(u,v,x,y,sum+1,vis,dir[i]);
        }
        vis[cx][cy]=false;
    }
    boolean valid(int i,int j,boolean vis[][])
    {
        return i>=0 && j>=0 && i<=10000 && j<=10000 && !vis[i][j];
    }
    public static void main(String args[])
    {
        Practice p=new Practice();
        p.solve();
    }
}

import java.util.*;
class Practice
{
    int dx[]={0,0,1,-1};
    int dy[]={1,-1,0,0};
    char dir[]={'n','s','e','w'};
    boolean vis[][];
    int min=0;
    void solve(int t)
    {
        while(t-->0)
        {
            int x=sc.nextInt();
            int y=sc.nextInt();
            vis=new boolean[10001][10001];
            min=0;
            dfs(0,0,x,y,Integer.MAX_VALUE,vis,'q');
            System.out.println(min);
        }
    }
    void dfs(int cx,int cy,int x,
    int y,int sum,boolean vis[][],char prev)
    {
        if(cx==x && cy==y)
        {
           min=Math.min(sum,min);
           return;
        }
        vis[cx][cy]=true;
        for(int i=0;i<4;i++)
        {
            int u=cx+dx[i];int v=cy+dy[i];
            if(valid(u,v,vis) && dir[i]!=prev)
                dfs(u,v,x,y,sum+1,vis,dir[i]);
        }
        vis[cx][cy]=false;
    }
    boolean valid(int i,int j,boolean vis[][])
    {
        return i>=0 && j>=0 && i<=10000 && j<=10000 && !vis[i][j];
    }
    public static void main(String args[])
    {
        Scanner sc = new Scanner(System.in);
int t;
t=sc.nextInt();
        Practice p=new Practice();
        p.solve(t);
    }
}

11/20/20, 10:25 AM - +91 76119 88883: import java.io.*; // for handling input/output
import java.util.*; // contains Collections framework

// don't change the name of this class
// you can add inner classes if needed
class Main {
	public static void main (String[] args) {
                   Scanner s=new Scanner(System.in);
	        int N=s.nextInt();
		int arr[][]= new int[N][N];
		for(int i=0; i<N;i++)
		{
			for(int j=0; j<N;j++)
			{
				arr[i][j]=s.nextInt();
			}
        }
        int r=0;
        int k=0;
        int lastrow=N-1;
        int lastclm=N-1;
        while(r<=lastrow && k<=lastclm)
        {
        for(int j=r;j<=lastrow;j++){
            System.out.print(arr[j][k]+" ");
        }
        k++;                                    
        for(int j=k;j<=lastclm;j++){
            System.out.print(arr[lastrow][j]+" ");
        
        }
        lastrow--;
        if (r<=lastclm){
           for(int j=lastrow;j>=r;j--){
               System.out.print(arr[j][lastclm]+" ");
           }
        }   
        lastclm--;
        if(k<=lastrow){
            for(int j=lastclm;j>=k;j--){
                System.out.print(arr[r][j]+" ");
            }
        }
        r++;

        
    }     
       

}

}

11/21/20, 5:20 AM - +91 97432 18429: *Daily Quiz Q1*

#include<stdio.h> 
int main() { 
int a[] = {1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6}; 
int *ptr = (int*)(&a+1); 
printf("%d ", *(ptr-1) ); 
return 0; 
}

What will be the output?
11/21/20, 5:21 AM - +91 97432 18429: *Ans Q1* : 6

Explanation : &a is address of the whole array a[]. If we add 1 to &a, we get “base address of a[] + sizeof(a)”. And this value is typecasted to int *. So ptr points the memory just after 6 is stored. ptr is typecasted to "int *" and value of *(ptr-1) is printed. Since ptr points memory after 6, ptr – 1 points to 6.
11/21/20, 5:21 AM - +91 97432 18429: <Media omitted>
11/21/20, 8:26 AM - +91 95600 39197: In line 8, it will be
int*ptr= (int*)(&a +1)

    }

#include <bits/stdc++.h>
#define ll long long
#define pb push_back
#define mp make_pair
#define fast() ios_base::sync_with_stdio(false); cin.tie(NULL); cout.tie(NULL);
#define fr(i,a,b) for(i=a;i<b;i++)
#define ffr(i,a,b) for(i=a;i<=b;i++)
#define fnr(i,a,b) for(i=a;i>=b;i--)
#define lcm(a,b) (a*b)/(__gcd(a,b))
#define bit(x,j) ((x>>j)&1)
#define pi 3.14159265358979323846
using namespace std;
const long long N = 1e18;
const long long mod = 1e9 + 7;
ll dp[100005];
/*ll find(ll x){
    return !vis[x]?x:vis[x]=find(vis[x]);
}*/
/*ll fac(ll x){
    ll c=1;
    for(ll i=2;i<=x;i++){
        c*=i;
    }
    return c;
}*/
int main() {
	// your code goes here
	fast()
	ll t=1;
	cin>>t;
	while(t--){
	    ll n;
	    cin>>n;
	    ll a[n];
	    ll i;
	    vector<ll> v;
	    fr(i,0,n){
	        cin>>a[i];
	        if(i>0){
	            if(a[i]==a[i-1]){
	                continue;
	            }
	            else{
	                v.pb(a[i]);
	            }
	        }
	       else{
	           v.pb(a[i]);
	       }
	    }
	    ll st = v[0];
	    ll en = v[v.size()-1];
	    if(v.size()==1){
	        cout<<0<<endl;
	        continue;
	    }
	    map<ll,ll> m;
	    for(i=0;i<v.size();i++){
	        m[v[i]]++;
	    }
	    ll mn=1000000;
 
	    
	    for(auto l : m){
 
	        if(l.first == st && l.first == en){
	            mn = min(mn,l.second-1);
	        }
	        else if(l.first == st || l.first == en){
	            mn = min(mn,l.second);
	        }
	        else{
	            mn = min(mn,l.second+1);
	        }
	    }
	    cout<<mn<<endl;
	}
	return 0;
}

11/28/20, 2:16 PM - +91 91238 47093: #include<iostream>
#include<climits>
using namespace std;

int maxDigit(long long num) {
    int max=INT_MIN;
    while(num) {
        if(max<num%10)
            max=num%10;
        num/=10;
    }
    return max;
}
int main() {
    long long num;
    cout<<"Enter a number:- ";
    cin>>num;
    cout<<"Max digit in "<<num<<" is: "<<maxDigit(num)<<endl;

    return 0;
}

11/28/20, 2:23 PM - +91 70930 58788: class Solution {
    List<List<Integer>> ans=new ArrayList<>();
    public List<List<Integer>> fourSum(int[] nums, int target) {
        if(nums.length<4)
            return ans;
        int n=nums.length;
        Arrays.sort(nums);
        for(int i=0;i<n-3;i++)
        {
            if(nums[i]==nums[i+1])
                continue;
            for(int j=i+1;j<n-2;j++)
            {
                if(nums[j]==nums[j+1])
                    continue;
                int sum=nums[i]+nums[j];
                int rem=target-sum;
                int l=j+1;
                int h=n-1;
                while(l<h)
                {
                    if(nums[l]+nums[h]==rem)
                    {
                        List<Integer> temp=new ArrayList<>();
                        temp.add(nums[i]);temp.add(nums[j]);
                        temp.add(nums[l]);temp.add(nums[h]);
                        ans.add(temp);
                        while(l<h && nums[l]==nums[i+1])
                            l++;
                        while(l<h && nums[h-1]==nums[h])
                            h--;
                        l++;h--;
                    }
                    else if(nums[l]+nums[h]<rem)
                    {
                        l++;
                    }
                    else 
                        h--;
                }
            }
        }
        return ans;
    }
}

12/1/20, 8:22 PM - +91 97432 18429: #include<stdio.h>    
#include<stdlib.h> 

int main(){  
    int n[10], i, j, binno,dn,w,k;
    printf("Enter the array length\n");
    scanf("%d",&w);
    printf("Enter the number to convert: \n");
    for(int j =0;j<w;j++){
        scanf("%d\n",&n[j]);
    }
    for(k=0;k<w;k++)
    {
        dn=n[k];
        i=1;
        binno=0;
        for(j=n[k];j>0;j=j/2)
        {
            binno=binno+(n[k]%2)*i;
            i=i*10;
            n[k]=n[k]/2;
        }
        printf("The Binary of %d is %d\n",dn,binno);
    }
    return 0;
}

12/2/20, 9:59 AM - +91 91238 47093: #include<iostream>
#include<map>
using namespace std;
typedef long long ll;


ll largestNumberRepeat(ll arr[],ll n)
{
    map<ll,ll> m;
    map<ll,ll>:: iterator it;
    for (ll i = 0; i < n; i++)
        m[arr[i]]++;
    auto mapEnd=m.end();
    mapEnd--;
    for(it=mapEnd;it!=m.begin();it--)
        if(it->second > 1)
            return it->first;
    return 0;
}

int main()
{
    ll n;
    cin>>n;
    ll arr[n];
    for(ll i=0;i<n;i++)
        cin>>arr[i];
    cout << largestNumberRepeat(arr,n) << endl;

    return 0;
}

class Solution {
    HashMap<Character,Integer> hm1=new HashMap<>();
    TreeMap<Integer,ArrayList<Character>> hm2=new TreeMap<>(Collections.reverseOrder());
    public String rankTeams(String[] votes) {
        for(String s:votes)
        {
            int points=1000;
            for(int i=0;i<s.length();i++)
            {
                if(hm1.containsKey(s.charAt(i)))
                    hm1.put(s.charAt(i),hm1.get(s.charAt(i))+points);
                else
                    hm1.put(s.charAt(i),points);
                points--;
            }
        }
        for(Map.Entry<Character,Integer> map:hm1.entrySet())
        {
            if(hm2.containsKey(map.getValue()))
            {
                hm2.get(map.getValue()).add(map.getKey());
            }
            else
            {
                ArrayList<Character> temp=new ArrayList<>();
                temp.add(map.getKey());
                hm2.put(map.getValue(),temp);
            }
        }
        String ans="";
        for(Map.Entry<Integer,ArrayList<Character>> map:hm2.entrySet())
        {
            Collections.sort(map.getValue());
            for(Character c:map.getValue())
            {
                ans+=c;
             }
        }
        return ans;
    }
}

Problem Difficulty: 1
Problem Constraints: N<=1000
Car No >=0 && Car No <=1000000000
Problem Description:
Due to an immense rise in Pollution, Kejriwal is back with the Odd and Even Rule in Delhi. The scheme is as follows, each car will be allowed to run on Sunday if the sum of digits which are even is divisible by 4 or sum of digits which are odd in that number is divisible by 3. However to check every car for the above criteria can't be done by the Delhi Police. You need to help Delhi Police by finding out if a car numbered N will be allowed to run on Sunday?
Input Format: The first line contains N , then N integers follow each denoting the number of the car.
Sample Input: 2
12345
12134
Output Format: N lines each denoting "Yes" or "No" depending upon whether that car will be allowed on Sunday or Not !
Sample Output: Yes
No

12/13/20, 10:43 AM - +91 70115 09528: package matrixDs;

import java.util.Arrays;

public class MedianOfARowWiseSortedMatrix {
    public static void main(String[] args) {
        int r = 3, c = 3;
        int[][] arr = new int[r][c];
        int num = 1;
        for (int i = 0; i < r; i++) {
            for (int j = 0; j < c; j++) {
                arr[i][j] = num++;
                System.out.print(arr[i][j] + " ");
            }
            System.out.println();
        }
        System.out.println(median(arr, r, c));
    }

    public static int median(int[][] arr, int r, int c) {
        int min = arr[0][0];
        int max = arr[0][c - 1];
        for (int i = 1; i < r; i++) {
            if (arr[i][0] < min)
                min = arr[i][0];
            if (arr[i][c - 1] > max)
                max = arr[i][c - 1];
        }
        int medPos = ((r * c) + 1) / 2;
        while (min < max) {
            int mid = min + max / 2;
            int midPos = 0;
            for (int i = 0; i < r; i++) {
                int pos = Arrays.binarySearch(arr[i], mid) + 1;
                midPos += Math.abs(pos);
            }
            if (midPos < medPos)
                min = mid + 1;
            else
                max = mid;
        }
        return min;
    }
}

12/15/20, 1:01 PM - +91 98269 13383: Choose the correct option.



If we replace STATEMENT 1 with a != k and 
STATEMENT 2 with a = a - k; and 
STATEMENT 3 with b = f * h / a; , 
then the program computes LCM of the two numbers (a and k) and stores the result in b  
 
If we replace STATEMENT 1 with k == k and 
STATEMENT 2 with h = k - f and 
STATEMENT 3 with k = b * h / a
then the program computes LCM of the two numbers (a and k) and stores the result in b 
 
If we replace STATEMENT 1 with k == a and
STATEMENT 2 with k = f - b and
STATEMENT 3 with h = b + b / a
then the program computes LCM of the two numbers (a and k) and stores the result in b 
 
If we replace STATEMENT 1 with h >= k and
STATEMENT 2 with h = h - a and
STATEMENT 3 with h = f + a / a
then the program computes LCM of the two numbers (a and k) and stores the result in b

12/16/20, 1:23 AM - +91 70930 58788: For this Question, I have done this solution, but isn't working, can anyone tell me the mistake!?
-----------------
class Solution {
    boolean ans=false;
    public void solveSudoku(char[][] board) {
        HashSet<String> hs=new HashSet<>();
        for(int i=0;i<9;i++)
        {
            for(int j=0;j<9;j++)
            {
                char k=board[i][j];
                hs.add(k+" is in row "+i);
                            hs.add(k+" is in col "+j) ;
                            hs.add(k+" is in block "+i/3+"-"+j/3);
            }
        }
        dfs(board,0,0,hs);
    }
    void dfs(char board[][],int r,int c,HashSet<String> hs)
    {
        if(c>=9)
        {
            c=0;
            r++;
        }
        if(r==9)
        {
            ans=true;
            return;
        }
        for(int j=c;j<9;j++)
        { 
            if(board[r][j]=='.')
            {
                for(int k=1;k<=9;k++)
                {
                    if(!hs.contains(k+" is in row "+r) && !hs.contains(k+" is in col "+j) &&!hs.contains(k+" is in block "+r/3+"-"+j/3))
                        {
                            hs.add(k+" is in row "+r);
                            hs.add(k+" is in col "+j) ;
                            hs.add(k+" is in block "+r/3+"-"+j/3);
                            board[r][j]=(char)(k+'0');
                            dfs(board,r,j+1,hs);
                            if(ans)
                                return;
                            hs.remove(k+" is in row "+r);
                            hs.remove(k+" is in col "+j) ;
                            hs.remove(k+" is in block "+r/3+"-"+j/3);
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

12/17/20, 8:59 PM - +91 70930 58788: Find whether path exist 
Medium Accuracy: 42.18% Submissions: 3325 Points: 4
-------------------------------------------------------------
Given a square matrix filled with 0, 1, 2, 3. Check whether there is a path possible from the source to destination. You can traverse up, down, right and left. (Check Your Task for more details).

Input:
The first line of input is an integer T denoting the no of testcases. Then T test cases follow. Each test case consists of 2 lines. The first line of each test case contains an integer N denoting the size of the square matrix. Then in the next line are N*N space-separated values of the matrix (M).

Output:
Complete isExist function and return 1 if the path exists from source to destination else return 0.

Your Task:
You don't need to read input or print anything. Your task is to complete the function is_possible() which takes a square matrix (M) and its size (N) as inputs and returns true if there's path possible from the source to destination. Else, it returns false. 
You have to start from the Source, traverse through the blank cells and reach the Destination. You can move Up, Down, Right and Left. The description of cells is as follows:

A value of cell 1 means Source.
A value of cell 2 means Destination.
A value of cell 3 means Blank cell.
A value of cell 0 means Wall.
Note: There are only a single source and a single destination.

Expected Time Complexity: O(N2).
Expected Auxiliary Space: O(N2).

Constraints:
1 <= T <= 100
1 <= N <= 100

Example:
Input:
2
4
3 0 0 0 0 3 3 0 0 1 0 3 0 2 3 3 
3
0 3 2 3 0 0 1 0 0

Output:
1
0

Explanation:
Testcase 1: The matrix for the above given input is:
3 0 0 0
0 3 3 0
0 1 0 3
0 2 3 3
From the matrix we can see that there exists a path from to reach destination 2 from source 1.
Testcase 2: The matrix for the above-given input is:
0 3 2
3 0 0
1 0 0
From the matrix, we can see that there does not exist any path to reach destination 2 from source 1.
12/17/20, 8:59 PM - +91 70930 58788: For above question, I have done this solution but not working, anyone try to find the mistake!
12/17/20, 8:59 PM - +91 70930 58788: class Solution {
    int dx[]={0,0,-1,1};
    int dy[]={1,-1,0,0};
    boolean vis[][];
    public static int is_possible(int M[][], int N) {
        // your code goes here
        Solution s=new Solution();
        return s.solve(M)?1:0;
    }
    boolean solve(int m[][])
    {
        vis=new boolean[m.length][m[0].length];
        for(int i=0;i<m.length;i++)
        {
            for(int j=0;j<m[i].length;j++)
            {
                if(m[i][j]==1 && dfs(i,j,m))
                {
                    return true;
                }
            }
        }
        return false;
    }
    boolean dfs(int x,int y,int m[][])
    {
        vis[x][y]=true;
        for(int i=0;i<4;i++)
        {
            if(valid(x+dx[i],y+dy[i],m) && m[x+dx[i]][y+dy[i]]==2)
            return true;
            else if(valid(x+dx[i],y+dy[i],m) && dfs(x+dx[i],y+dy[i],m))
                return true;
        }
        return false;
    }
    boolean valid(int i,int j,int m[][])
    {
        return i>=0 && j>=0 && i<m.length && j<m[0].length && !vis[i][j] && m[i][j]==3;
    }
}
12/17/20, 9:35 PM - +91 91238 47093: #include<iostream>
#include<vector>
#include<algorithm>
using namespace std;

vector<int> minMax(vector<int> &arr)
{
    vector<int> ans;
    if(arr.size()==1)
    {
        for(int i=0;i<2;i++)
            ans.push_back(arr[0]);
        return ans;
    }
    int minn=min(arr[0],arr[1]);
    int maxx=max(arr[0],arr[1]);
    if(arr.size()==2)
    {
        for(int i=0;i<2;i++)
            ans.push_back(arr[i]);
        return ans;
    }
    if(arr.size()%2==0)
    {
        for(int i=2;i<arr.size()-1;i+=2)
        {
            int pairMin=min(arr[i],arr[i+1]);
            int pairMax=max(arr[i],arr[i+1]);
            minn=min(minn,pairMin);
            maxx=max(maxx,pairMax);
        }
    }
    else
    {
        for (int i=2;i<arr.size()-2;i+=2)
        {
            int pairMin=min(arr[i],arr[i+1]);
            int pairMax=max(arr[i],arr[i+1]);
            minn = min(minn,pairMin);
            maxx = max(maxx,pairMax);
        }
        if(arr[arr.size()-1]>maxx)
            maxx=arr[arr.size()-1];
        if (arr[arr.size()-1]<minn)
            minn=arr[arr.size()-1];
    }
    ans.push_back(minn);
    ans.push_back(maxx);
    return ans;
}

int main()
{
    int t;
    cin>>t;
    while(t--)
    {
        int n;
        cin>>n;
        vector<int> vec;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++)
        {
            int temp;
            cin>>temp;
            vec.push_back(temp);
        }
        vector<int> ans=minMax(vec);
        cout<<ans[0]<<" "<<ans[1]<<endl;
    }
    return 0;
}

12/20/20, 4:39 PM - +91 63044 49114: #include <bits/stdc++.h>
using namespace std;

void Phone_no(string str,int l,int r)
{
    int len = str.length();
    
    if(len == 2 || len == 3){
        for(int i = l; i < r; ++i)
            cout << str[i];
        
        return;
    }
    
    if(len == 4){
      
        for(int i = l; i < r / 2; ++i)
             cout << str[i];
        cout << "-";
        
        for(int i = r / 2; i < r; ++i)
             cout << str[i];
        
        return;
    }
    
    int j = 0;
    while(j < len){
        
        cout << str[j] << str[j + 1] << str[j + 2];
        cout << "-";
        j += 3;
        if((len - j) == 4)
             Phone_no(str,j,len);
        
        if((len - j) == 3)
             Phone_no(str,j,len);
        
        if((len - j) == 2)
             Phone_no(str,j,len);
    }
    
    
}



int main()
{
    string str;
    getline(cin,str);
    // int temp; cin >> temp;
    // cout << str;
    string res;
    int len = 0;
    for(int i = 0; i < str.length(); ++i)
        if(str[i] != ' ' || str[i] != '-')
              res[len++] = str[i];
    Phone_no(res,0,len);
    return 0;
    
}

12/20/20, 9:11 PM - +91 70930 58788: import java.util.*;
class Practice
{
  void solve()
  {
    Scanner sc=new Scanner(System.in);
    int n=sc.nextInt();
    String s=sc.next();
    HashMap<Character,Integer> map=new HashMap<>();
    int count=0;
    for(int i=0;i<s.length();i++)
    {
      if(Character.isLowerCase(s.charAt(i)))
      {
        map.put(s.charAt(i),map.getOrDefault(s.charAt(i),0)+1);
      }
      else{
          char curr=s.charAt(i);
          char reqKey=Character.toLowerCase(curr);
          if(map.containsKey(reqKey) && map.get(reqKey)>0)
          {
            map.put(reqKey,map.get(reqKey)-1);
          }
          else
          count++;
      }
    }
    System.out.println(count);
  }
  public static void main(String[] args) {
    Practice p=new Practice();
    p.solve();
  }
}

12/22/20, 3:23 PM - +91 70930 58788: List<Integer> li=new ArrayList<>();
      Node curr=head;
      while(curr!=null)
      {
        li.add(curr.val);
        curr=curr.next;
      }
      int prev=-1;
      HashSet<Integer> ind=new HashSet<>();
      for(int i=0;i<li.size();i++)
      {
        if(li.get(i)<prev)
        {
          ind.add(i);
        }
        else
        prev=li.get(i);
      }
      for(int index:ind)
      {
        int res=(li.get(index-1)+li.get(index+1))/2;
        li.set(index,res);
      }
      curr=head;
      for(int val:li)
      {
        curr.val=val;
        curr=curr.next;
      }
      return head;

12/22/20, 9:14 PM - +91 70930 58788: class Solution {
    int dx[]={0,0,1,-1,-1,1,-1,1};
    int dy[]={-1,1,0,0,-1,1,1,-1};
    boolean vis[][];
    int m,n;
    public int shortestPathBinaryMatrix(int[][] grid) {
        m=grid.length;
        n=grid[0].length;
        if(grid[0][0]==1)
            return -1;
        vis=new boolean[m][n];
        Queue<Point> q=new LinkedList<>();
        q.add(new Point(0,0,1));
       while(q.size()>0)
       {
           Point p=q.poll();
           if(p.x==m-1 && p.y==n-1)
           {
               return p.time;
           }
           vis[p.x][p.y]=true;
           for(int i=0;i<8;i++)
           {
               if(valid(p.x+dx[i],p.y+dy[i],grid))
                   q.add(new Point(p.x+dx[i],p.y+dy[i],p.time+1));
           }
       }
        return -1;
    }
    boolean valid(int i,int j,int grid[][])
    {
        return i>=0 && j>=0 && i<m && j<n && grid[i][j]==0 && !vis[i][j];
    }
}
class Point
{
    int x,y,time;
    Point(int x,int y,int time)
    {
        this.x=x;
        this.y=y;
        this.time=time;
    }
}
12/22/20, 10:11 PM - +91 70115 09528: public static int intersectionOfArraysEff(int a[], int b[]) {
        HashSet<Integer> h1 = new HashSet<Integer>();
        HashSet<Integer> h2 = new HashSet<Integer>();
        int c = 0;
        for (int x : a) {
            h1.add(x);
        }
        for (int x : b) {
            h2.add(x);
        }
        for (int x : h1) {
            if (h2.contains(x))
                c++;
        }
        return c;
    }

12/23/20, 9:55 PM - +91 70115 09528: public static boolean zeroSumSubArrayEff(int []arr){
        HashSet<Integer> hashSet=new HashSet<>();
        int sum=arr[0];
        for (int i=1;i<arr.length;i++){
            if (hashSet.contains(sum))
                return true;
            hashSet.add(sum);
            sum+=arr[i];
        }
        return false;
    }

        HashSet<Integer> hashSet = new HashSet<>();
        int sum = arr[0];
        for (int i = 1; i < arr.length; i++) {
            if (hashSet.contains(sum))
                return true;

            sum += arr[i];
        }

    }

12/23/20, 10:41 PM - +91 70115 09528: public static boolean givenSumSubArrayEff(int[] arr, int x) {
        HashSet<Integer> hashSet = new HashSet<>();
        int sum = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < arr.length; i++) {
            if (sum == x)
                return true;
            if (hashSet.contains(sum - x))
                return true;
            hashSet.add(sum);
            sum += arr[i];
        }
        return false;
    }

12/28/20, 10:02 AM - +91 80103 79281: import threading 
#this is for python 3.0 and above. use import thread for python2.0 versions
from threading import*
import time

d={} #'d' is the dictionary in which we store data

#for create operation 
#use syntax "create(key_name,value,timeout_value)" timeout is optional you can continue by passing two arguments without timeout

def create(key,value,timeout=0):
    if key in d:
        print("error: this key already exists") #error message1
    else:
        if(key.isalpha()):
            if len(d)<(1024*1020*1024) and value<=(16*1024*1024): #constraints for file size less than 1GB and Jasonobject value less than 16KB 
                if timeout==0:
                    l=[value,timeout]
                else:
                    l=[value,time.time()+timeout]
                if len(key)<=32: #constraints for input key_name capped at 32chars
                    d[key]=l
            else:
                print("error: Memory limit exceeded!! ")#error message2
        else:
            print("error: Invalind key_name!! key_name must contain only alphabets and no special characters or numbers")#error message3

#for read operation
#use syntax "read(key_name)"
            
def read(key):
    if key not in d:
        print("error: given key does not exist in database. Please enter a valid key") #error message4
    else:
        b=d[key]
        if b[1]!=0:
            if time.time()<b[1]: #comparing the present time with expiry time
                stri=str(key)+":"+str(b[0]) #to return the value in the format of JasonObject i.e.,"key_name:value"
                return stri
            else:
                print("error: time-to-live of",key,"has expired") #error message5
        else:
            stri=str(key)+":"+str(b[0])
            return stri

#for delete operation
#use syntax "delete(key_name)"

def delete(key):
    if key not in d:
        print("error: given key does not exist in database. Please enter a valid key") #error message4
    else:
        b=d[key]
        if b[1]!=0:
            if time.time()<b[1]: #comparing the current time with expiry time
                del d[key]
                print("key is successfully deleted")
            else:
                print("error: time-to-live of",key,"has expired") #error message5
        else:
            del d[key]
            print("key is successfully deleted")

#I have an additional operation of modify in order to change the value of key before its expiry time if provided

#for modify operation 
#use syntax "modify(key_name,new_value)"

def modify(key,value):
    b=d[key]
    if b[1]!=0:
        if time.time()<b[1]:
            if key not in d:
                print("error: given key does not exist in database. Please enter a valid key") #error message6
            else:
                l=[]
                l.append(value)
                l.append(b[1])
                d[key]=l
        else:
            print("error: time-to-live of",key,"has expired") #error message5
    else:
        if key not in d:
            print("error: given key does not exist in database. Please enter a valid key") #error message6
        else:
            l=[]
            l.append(value)
            l.append(b[1])
            d[key]=l

12/29/20, 9:22 PM - +91 70115 09528: public static int binarySubArrayEff(int[] arr) {
        HashMap<Integer, Integer> hashMap = new HashMap<>();
        int maxLen = 0;
        int sum = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < arr.length; i++) {
            if (arr[i] == 0)
                arr[i] = -1;
        }
        for (int i = 0; i < arr.length; i++) {
            if (sum == 0)
                maxLen = i + 1;
            if (!hashMap.containsKey(sum))
                hashMap.put(sum, i);
            else
                maxLen = Math.max(maxLen, i - hashMap.get(sum));
        }
        return maxLen;
    }

class Practice
{
     ArrayList<ArrayList<Integer>> adj=new ArrayList<>();
     ArrayList<ArrayList<Integer>> radj=new ArrayList<>();
     boolean vis[];
     java.util.Stack <Integer> st=new java.util.Stack<>();
     void solve()
     {
          Scanner sc=new Scanner(System.in);
          int n=sc.nextInt();
          int m=sc.nextInt();
          for(int i=0;i<n;i++)
          {
               adj.add(new ArrayList<>());
               radj.add(new ArrayList<>());
          }
          vis=new boolean[n];
          for(int i=0;i<m;i++)
          {
               int u=sc.nextInt();
               int v=sc.nextInt();
               u--;v--;
               adj.get(u).add(v);
          }
          for(int i=0;i<n;i++)
          {
               if(!vis[i])
                    dfs1(i);
          }
          Arrays.fill(vis,false);
          reverseGraph();
          int count=0;
          int ans[]=new int[n];
          while(!st.isEmpty())
          {
               int u=st.pop();
               if(!vis[u])
               {
                    count++;
                    dfs2(u);
               }
               ans[u]=count;
          }
          System.out.println(count);
          for(int val:ans)
               System.out.print(val+" ");
     }
     void dfs2(int u)
     {
         // System.out.print(u+" ");
          vis[u]=true;
          for(int v:radj.get(u))
          {
               if(!vis[v])
                    dfs2(v);
          }
     }
     void reverseGraph()
     {
          for(int i=0;i<adj.size();i++)
          {
               for(int v:adj.get(i))
               {
                    radj.get(v).add(i);
               }
          }
     }
     void dfs1(int u)
     {
          vis[u]=true;
          for(int v:adj.get(u))
          {
               if(!vis[v])
                    dfs1(v);
          }
          st.push(u);
     }
     public static void main(String[] args) {
          Practice p=new Practice();
          p.solve();
     }
}

12/30/20, 8:55 PM - +91 70930 58788: For this question I have done this solution, but getting wrong answer for some test cases, this is actually a DP problem but I first wanted to try using recursion, and then go to DP,but this is getting wrong answer, anyone try to debug
----------------------------------------
class Solution {
    boolean vis[];
    int max=0;
    public int longestStrChain(String[] words) {
        vis=new boolean[words.length];
        for(int i=0;i<words.length;i++)
        {
            dfs(words,1,words[i],i);
        }
        return max;
    }
    void dfs(String words[],int count,String prev,int ind)
    {
       max=Math.max(max,count);
       vis[ind]=true;
       for(int i=0;i<words.length;i++)
       {
           if(!vis[i] && valid(prev,words[i]))
           {    
               dfs(words,count+1,words[i],i);
            }
       }
       vis[ind]=false;
    }
    boolean valid(String a,String b)
    {
        if(a.length()+1==b.length())
        {
            boolean done=false;
            int i=0;int j=0;
            while(i<a.length() && j<b.length())
            {
                if(a.charAt(i)!=b.charAt(j))
                {
                    if(done)
                        return false;
                    done=true;
                    j++;
                }
                i++;j++;
            }
            return true;
        }
        return false;
    }
}

1/2/21, 7:38 PM - +91 72239 50090: import math
class Solution:
    # @param A : integer
    # @return an integer
    def solve(self, A):
        x=int(math.sqrt(A))
        if ((x*x)>A):
            return x+x
        elif (x*(x+1))>A:
            return x+x+1
        else:
            return x+x+2

class Codechef

	{
Scanner sc=new Scanner(System.in);
		int t;
		t=sc.nextInt();
		while(t-->0) {
			long n=sc.nextLong();
			long k=sc.nextLong();
			long x=sc.nextLong();
			long y=sc.nextLong();
			if(x==y) {
				System.out.println(n+" "+n);
			}
			else if(x>y) {
				long arr[]= {n,n-x+y,n-x+y,n,0,x-y,x-y,0};
				long m=k%4;
				if(m==1)
					System.out.println(arr[0]+" "+arr[1]);
				else if(m==2)
					System.out.println(arr[2]+" "+arr[3]);
				else if(m==3)
					System.out.println(arr[4]+" "+arr[5]);
				else
					System.out.println(arr[6]+" "+arr[7]);
				continue;	
			}
			else
			{
				long arr[]= {n-y+x,n,n,x,y-x,0,0,y-x};
				long m=k%4;
				if(m==1)
					System.out.println(arr[0]+" "+arr[1]);
				else if(m==2)
					System.out.println(arr[2]+" "+arr[3]);
				else if(m==3)
					System.out.println(arr[4]+" "+arr[5]);
				else
					System.out.println(arr[6]+" "+arr[7]);
				continue;	
			}
					
				
			
	}
		sc.close();



}}

1/10/21, 4:58 PM - +92 336 5263042: #include <iostream>
using namespace std;
#include <math.h>

//This function will return the sum of the factorials of each digit of the inputed number.
int peter(int num)
{
    int r,sum=0,f=2,i;

    while(num!=0)
    {
        r=num%10;
        for(i=1;i<=r;i++)
        f=f*i;
        sum=sum+f;
        f=1;
        num=num/10;

    }
    return sum;
}


// This is the main function

int main()
{
   int num,sum=0;
 cout<<"Enter any number to check Peterson:\n";
   cin>>num;
    int new_num;
    new_num=num;
 sum=peter(num);
  if(sum=new_num)
        cout<<num<<" is a Peterson number";
    else
        cout<<num<< " is not a Peterson number";

	return 0;
}

    }
    return sum;

5
 Bucks each). Optimally, he starts producing chairs for only those employees who are currently idle and needs rest.

A
 consisting of characters

M

D
, 
L

U

M

D

L
: An employee starts selling the Candies freeing up a chair.

The second line contains string 
A

U
, 
D
, 
M
, 
L
.

Output Format

Constraints
1
≤
T
≤
5

≤
|
A
|
≤
10
5
, where 
|
A
|
 represents the length of the string.

Time Limit
1 second

Examples
Input

LLL

0

import java.io.*;

public class Main {
 public static void main(String args[]) throws IOException {

        Scanner sc = new Scanner(System.in);
        int t = sc.nextInt();
        String str = " ";
        while(t>0){
            str = sc.next();
            int o = 0;
            int v = 0;
            for(int i =0 ;i<str.length();i++){
                if(str.charAt(i)=='U'||str.charAt(i)=='M') o++;
                else if(str.charAt(i)=='L'||str.charAt(i)=='D') o--;
            }
            if(o>0) o = o*5;
            else o =0;
            System.out.println(o);
            t--;
        }

    }
}

1/13/21, 10:11 PM - +91 91238 47093: <Media omitted>
1/13/21, 10:11 PM - +91 91238 47093: class Solution {
public:
    bool isPalindrome(string s) {
        if(s.length()==0)
            return true;
        char a;
        char b;
        int l=0;
        int r=s.length()-1;
        while(l<r)
        {
            a=s[l];
            b=s[r];
            if(a>='A' && a<='Z')
                a=upperToLower((char)s[l]);
            if(s[r]>='A' && s[r]<='Z')
                b=upperToLower((char)s[r]);
            
            s[l]=a;
            s[r]=b;
            
            
            while(s[l]<'a' || s[l]>'z')
            {
                if(s[l]>='0' && s[l]<='9')
                    break;
                l++;
                if(l==s.length())
                        return true;
            }
            
            while(s[r]<'a' || s[r]>'z')
            {
                if(s[r]>='0' && s[r]<='9')
                    break;
                r--;
            }
            
            
            if(s[l]!=s[r])
                return false;
            l++;
            r--;
        }
        return true;
    }
    
    char upperToLower(char ch) { return (ch>='A' && ch<='Z')? (char)(ch+32): ch; }
};

1/15/21, 8:08 PM - +91 70930 58788: For this question, I have done this solution, but getting wrong answer, anyone tell the bug in this code.
----------
import java.util.*;
public class Contest
{
    int dx4[]={0,0,1,-1};
    int dy4[]={1,-1,0,0};
    int dx8[]={0,0,-1,1,-1,1,-1,1};
    int dy8[]={1,-1,0,0,-1,1,1,-1};
    List<List<Integer>> adj=new ArrayList<>();
    boolean vis[];
    int intial;
    int countE;
    int countV;
    boolean found;
    void solve()
    {
        Scanner sc=new Scanner(System.in);
        int n=sc.nextInt();
        int m=sc.nextInt();
        vis=new boolean[n];
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++)
        {
            adj.add(new ArrayList<>());
        }
        for(int i=0;i<m;i++)
        {
            int u=sc.nextInt();
            int v=sc.nextInt();
            u--;v--;
            adj.get(u).add(v);
            adj.get(v).add(u);
        }
       int ans=0;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++)
        {
            if(!vis[i])
            {
                intial=i;
                countE=0;
                countV=0;
                found=false;
                dfs(i,-1);
                if(found && countE==countV)
                    ans++;
                System.out.println(countV+" "+countE);
            }
        }
        System.out.println(ans);
    }
    void dfs(int u,int par){
        countV++;
        vis[u]=true;
        for(int v:adj.get(u))
        {
            if(v==par) continue;
            if(v==intial) found=true;
            if(!vis[v]) dfs(v,u);
            countE++;
        }
    }
    public static void main(String[] args) {
        Contest c=new Contest();
        c.solve();
    }
}

1/16/21, 12:31 PM - +91 79035 53605: #include <bits/stdc++.h>
using namespace std;
void swap(int *x, int *y)
{
    int temp = *x;
    *x = *y;
    *y = temp;
}
void bubblesort(int arr[], int n)
{
    int i, j;
    for (i = 0; i < n - 1; i++)

        for (j = 0; i < n - i - 1; j++)

            if (arr[j] > arr[j + 1])
                swap(&arr[j], &arr[j + 1]);
}
void printArray(int array[], int size)
{
    for (int i = 0; i < size; ++i)
    {
        cout << "  " << array[i];
    }
    cout << "\n";
}
int main()
{
    int n, arr[n];
    cin >> n;
    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
    {
        cin >> arr[i];
    }
    bubblesort(arr, n);
    printArray(arr, n);
    return 0;
}

using namespace std;
int fact(int n)
{
    int fac = 1;
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
    {
        fac = fac * i;
    }

    return fac;
}

    if x==n-1 and y==n-1:
        solution[x][y]=1
        print(solution)
        return 
    if x<0 or y<0 or x>=n or y>=n or maze[x][y]==0 or solution[x][y]==1:
        return 
    solution[x][y]==1 
    printpathhelper(x+1,y,maze,n,solution)
    printpathhelper(x,y+1,maze,n,solution)
    printpathhelper(x-1,y,maze,n,solution)
    printpathhelper(x,y-1,maze,n,solution)
    solution[x][y]=0
    return 
def printpath(maze):
    n=len(maze)
    solution=[[0 for j in range(n)]for i in range(n)]
    printpathhelper(0,0,maze,n,solution)

n=int(input())
maze=[]
for i in range(n):
    row=[int(ele) for ele in input().split(' ')]
    maze.append(row)
printpath(maze)
